official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 1 official moneyline pick cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Rating gates. 7 value-watch setups had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Minnesota Twins is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 78.6% model win probability and 9.1/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 78.6% against a 61.0% no-vig market number, a 17.6% model edge at -165. Minnesota Twins owns the starting pitcher edge by 45 points. Bullpen read: Supports LyDia side.
